title: Week of March 23, 2026
summary: This week brought significant automation improvements with OpsPal now automatically creating and updating your runbooks based on what it observes during operations. We also strengthened Salesforce deployment safety with new prevention tools that catch common configuration issues before they cause problems. Windows users can now install OpsPal more easily with our new native PowerShell installer.

entries.headline: OpsPal automatically creates runbooks from your daily operations
details: OpsPal now watches your regular RevOps tasks and automatically builds step-by-step runbooks
These runbooks capture what works and help you repeat successful processes
Runs quietly in the background without slowing down your work

entries.headline: Salesforce deployment safety checks work more reliably
details: Fixed issues where safety checks weren't properly reviewing your changes
Added protection against deleting required lookup fields
Deployments now have stronger guardrails against breaking configurations

entries.headline: Smart runbook system organizes procedures by scope and confidence
details: OpsPal tracks which procedures work best in different situations
Automatically groups runbooks by team, project, or process type
Scores procedures based on how reliable they've proven to be

entries.headline: Salesforce operations tracking now covers all automation types
details: OpsPal now properly tracks workflow rules and process flows
Extended tracking to HubSpot and Marketo operations
You get complete visibility into what OpsPal does across all your revenue systems

entries.headline: HubSpot and Marketo operations now tracked like Salesforce
details: OpsPal creates receipts for all actions in HubSpot and Marketo
You can verify what changed across all your revenue platforms
Same audit trail standards now apply to your entire revenue stack

entries.headline: Salesforce automation discovery runs more reliably
details: Fixed issues where OpsPal couldn't find all your flows and processes
Better tracking of complex automation discovery steps
More consistent results when analyzing your Salesforce org

entries.headline: Complete audit trail for all Salesforce automation analysis
details: OpsPal now tracks every step when analyzing triggers and classes
Better visibility into how flows are discovered and processed
Full accountability for all automation inventory activities

entries.headline: Production org protection allows safe data retrieval
details: You can now safely retrieve data from production without triggering warnings
OpsPal distinguishes between reading data and making changes
Clearer policies for what's safe to do in your live revenue systems

entries.headline: Automated release notes keep you informed of platform updates
details: OpsPal automatically generates user-friendly release notes
Updates are published daily so you know what's new
Technical details are translated into benefits you can understand

entries.headline: Smarter operation routing reduces unnecessary restrictions
details: OpsPal now allows more direct operations when they're clearly safe
Better recognition of simple permission tasks
Reduced friction for routine Salesforce administration

entries.headline: Simple record lookups work without complex routing
details: Looking up single records by ID now works directly
Quick verification queries run faster
Less overhead for basic data checking tasks

entries.headline: Native Windows installation supports Claude Code and Node.js
details: Windows users can now install OpsPal and its dependencies automatically
No need for manual software installation steps
Streamlined setup for Windows-based RevOps teams

entries.headline: Better detection when Salesforce connections fail
details: OpsPal now identifies authentication problems more clearly
Parent operations get notified when sub-processes encounter issues
Faster troubleshooting when org connections have problems

entries.headline: PowerShell installer works with cloud-based setup
details: Fixed compatibility issues when running the installer from the web
More reliable installation process for Windows users
Smoother onboarding experience for new team members

entries.headline: Production org queries work properly for read-only operations
Revenue assessments save context for future runbooks
Customizable templates and branding that survive platform updates
details: You can now customize OpsPal's templates and branding
Your customizations are preserved when OpsPal updates
Support for tenant-specific, site-specific, and global customization levels

entries.headline: Revenue field discovery adapts to your sales process
details: OpsPal automatically finds your org's revenue fields and sales stages
Assessments now work with custom revenue fields like ARR and ACV
Better analysis for orgs that don't use standard Amount fields

entries.headline: Automatic dependency installation during setup
PowerShell installer for Windows users
Smoother setup experience with better plugin detection
Deployment prevention tools catch configuration issues early
details: New validation checks prevent common picklist and record type problems
Automatically merges duplicate configuration settings
Prevents deployments that would exceed field history tracking limits

entries.headline: Automatic secret scanning prevents credential leaks
Enhanced security scanning for credential protection
Removed embedded credentials from platform code
